race.description: Termi Home And Commercial Bunbury Hcp (C1)
race.comment: FRIAR'S LEGACY (1) finds the second win elusive but it certainly hasn't been without trying. Has been right there in his three runs back and gets another good chance to land a winning blow. The engagement of Chris Parnham is a positive move. SO MUCH SERENITY (9) went forward over 1300m at Northam last time and held on gamely for second. Will be looking to cross early from the wide alley and run them along. LADY KIKI (6) never really looked likely first-up at Pinjarra when racing keenly throughout. Fiore sticks second-up and is drawn much kinder. Willing to forgive. FLYING FLYNN (3) improved sharply second-up at Albany when arriving just in time in the slop at Albany. Is open to further improvement third-up but draws out again. Keeping safe.
